Cc: Naomi Feldman <naomi.feldman@redwood.com>
Date: Thu, 11 Mar 2027 08:12:00 -0700
Subject: Increased P95/P99 latency over last 3 hours — production

Hi Ben,

We're seeing a sudden increase in tail latency from your Hosted API for our production tenant. P95 has climbed from ~220ms to ~1.2s and P99 is now consistently 2.5-3s for text.generate calls. This started about 3 hours ago and coincides with a higher error spike (5xx ~0.6%). Throughput is otherwise steady.

We rely on the 99th percentile for user-facing features and need this mitigated quickly. I've attached a short sample of traces and the aggregated P95/P99 export. Can your team confirm whether this is related to batching or request queueing?

Thanks,
Alice Reynolds
Head of Platform Operations
PivotalCare

We hit a wall on our final demo because we blew through the initial trial allocation while stress-testing embeddings and streaming. The accelerator requires a working demo for Friday and our usage projection says we need another 25k token-equivalent credits to get through tuning + demo.

Can Redwood extend our incubator trial and add a temporary credit boost? We'd be happy to share an updated milestone plan and a short usage snapshot to justify the ask.

Cc'ing Deb (accelerator ops) who can surface the milestone requirements required by the incubator.

Best,
Samir Shah
Co-founder, GreenFork Labs

Cc: procurement <procurement@finetext.ai>
Date: 2027-02-20T09:12:00-08:00
Subject: Major latency/SLA hits this morning — request for credit and plan

Ben,

We saw a significant spike in tail latency starting ~08:40 PST today; our customer-facing endpoints backed by the Redwood API reported increased 500/timeout rates and elevated P95/P99. We believe the root cause is the content-filter module invoking downstream moderation tooling redundantly — when the filter path returned an error the runtime retried and amplified latency.

This impacted three production services at Finetext (indexing, assistant, and summarization). Our ops attach a CSV with the request IDs and timestamps. We need: a formal SLA credit for the period of 08:40–09:50 PST and a remediation plan with timelines. Please escalate — this impacts our renewa...
